texto: Visual and performing artists produce art that lives in the present world. The art of the writer exists in another dimension. Through strings of words and phrases writers inspire their readers to imagine, to conjure images, to suspend disbelief, to enter a world visible only in their minds. It is in that unseen world where the art of the writer lives.
explicacao: Citação de Mindie Burgoyne sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Visual and performing artists produce art that lives in the present world. The art of the writer …” articula reflexao, art, mindie-burgoyne em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.
